x-enumeration-literals.name: IssuerCITIdentification
x-enumeration-literals.description: Identification, given by the Issuer, of the transaction processed with the cardholder that legitimates this merchant initiated transaction. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: MerchantCITIdentification
x-enumeration-literals.description: Identification, given by the merchant, of the transaction processed with the cardholder that legitimates this merchant initiated transaction. (ISO20022)
